name: CellDx-Tissue
summary: FDA-cleared comprehensive genomic profiling assay for solid tumors (517 genes, DNA+RNA). Tissue-based CGP test. Datar already tracked in DB as ecd-26 (Trucheck Intelli, a separate liquid biopsy product).

name: Caris ChromoSeq
summary: Whole genome tumor profiling assay for myeloid malignancies (AML, MDS, MPN). >200X depth of coverage, ~1.6B reads per patient. MolDX approved. Hematologic CGP — evaluate if in scope.

name: TOBY Urine MCED
summary: First urine-based multi-cancer early detection (MCED) test to receive FDA Breakthrough Device Designation. Analyzes volatile organic compounds (VOCs) in urine using spectroscopy and machine learning. Very early stage — no PMA filed.
status: deferred — reviewed 2026-06-06; pre-validation (BDD only), revisit on launch/validation

name: Tempus xH
summary: Whole-genome sequencing (WGS) test for hematologic malignancies (AML, MDS, MPN, overlap syndromes). Clinical availability announced June 1, 2026. In blinded MDS cohort, >99% sensitivity; uncovered 40% more clinically relevant genomic findings than standard of care. ASCO 2026 data presented.
